de: Regenwald vor dem Kipppunkt: Wenn die Bäume abgeholzt werden, bleibt der Regen aus. Grünes Wissen to go: Tropische Wälder produzieren gigantische Regenmengen. Pro Hektar entstehen mindestens 2,4 Millionen Liter pro Jahr. Allerdings gefährdet der Klimawandel diese Produktivität Der Fotosynthese sei Dank: Regenwälder produzieren große Mengen N…
en: Rainforest nearing the tipping point: If the trees are cut down, there will be no rain. Green knowledge to go: Tropical forests produce gigantic amounts of rain. At least 2.4 million liters are produced per hectare per year. However, climate change is endangering this productivity. Thanks to photosynthesis: rainforests produce large amounts of N...
la: Rainforest prope tipping punctum: Si caesa sunt arbores, pluvia non erit. Viridis cognitio ad eundum: Tropical silvae ingentes pluvias efficiunt. Saltem 2.4 decies centena liter per hectare per annum producuntur. Sed mutatio climatis haec fructibus in discrimen vocatur. Gratias agentes photosynthesi: pluviae silvae magnas moles N... faciunt.
